reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar!Paramos a descansar.Tiene mesas para sentarse a comer y tomar mate. Tiene un restaurant y puesto de venta de quesos, salamines y pan.ademas de otras cosas.Los baños muy limpios!

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place! We stopped to rest. It has tables where you can sit and eat and drink mate. It has a restaurant and a stand selling cheese, salami, and bread, among other things. The bathrooms are very clean!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJNDVucnBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar amplio cómodo para hacer un alto en el camino, gran arboleda y baños higiénicos todos los servicios

(Translated by Google)
Spacious and comfortable place to stop along the way, large grove of trees and hygienic restrooms with all services

We went to the grill and I personally didn't like it and I thought it was expensive for the quality. I won't be back.
